ddls:
CREATE TABLE "loans" (
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan record */,
  "interest_rate" TEXT /* Interest rate applicable for the loan */,
  "principal_amount" TEXT /* Initial principal amount of the loan */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the loan */,
  "cumulative_interest" TEXT /* Cumulative interest accrued on the loan */,
  "loan_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the loan type */,
  "loan_term" INTEGER /* Duration of the loan in months */,
  "bank_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bank providing the loan */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan application */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the loan became effective */,
  "interest_type" TEXT /* Type of interest (e.g., fixed, variable) */,
  "interest_rate_adjustment_date" TEXT /* Date when the interest rate was last adjusted (for variable rates) */,
  "last_payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the last payment made */,
  "next_payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the next payment due */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the loan (e.g., Active, Paid Off, Default) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES loan_applications ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_bank_id FOREIGN KEY ("bank_id") REFERENCES banks ("bank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_loan_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_type_id") REFERENCES loan_types ("loan_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_types" (
  "loan_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan type */,
  "loan_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the loan type (e.g., Personal Loan, Mortgage) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loan type */,
  "minimum_term" INTEGER /* Minimum term for the loan type in months */,
  "maximum_term" INTEGER /* Maximum term for the loan type in months */,
  "minimum_amount" TEXT /* Minimum loan amount for the loan type */,
  "maximum_amount" TEXT /* Maximum loan amount for the loan type */,
  "interest_rate_range" TEXT /* Range of interest rates for the loan type (e.g., 5.00-8.00%) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "banks" (
  "bank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bank */,
  "bank_name" TEXT /* Name of the bank */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the bank */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the bank */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the bank */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the bank */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email address of the bank */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the bank's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the customer */,
  "income" TEXT /* Annual income of the customer */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the customer (e.g., Employed, Self-Employed, Unemployed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan application */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer applying for the loan */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan being applied for */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the application (e.g., Pending, Approved, Rejected) */,
  "application_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the loan being applied for */,
  "application_term" INTEGER /* Term of the loan being applied for in months */,
  "application_interest_rate" TEXT /* Interest rate being applied for */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the application was approved */,
  "rejection_reason" TEXT /* Reason for rejection if the application was rejected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment record */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan being paid */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Bank Transfer, Credit Card) */,
  "payment_number" INTEGER /* Sequential number of the payment */,
  "principal_amount_paid" TEXT /* Amount of principal paid in this payment */,
  "interest_amount_paid" TEXT /* Amount of interest paid in this payment */,
  "balance_after_payment" TEXT /* Remaining balance of the loan after this payment */,
  "late_fee" TEXT /* Late fee amount if the payment was late */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interest_rates" (
  "interest_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interest rate record */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan associated with this interest rate */,
  "rate" TEXT /* Interest rate value */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the interest rate became effective */,
  "interest_type" TEXT /* Type of interest (e.g., fixed, variable) */,
  "adjustment_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of interest rate adjustments (e.g., monthly, annually) */,
  "adjustment_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the interest rate adjustment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interest_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interest_rates_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user logging into the system */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., loan officer, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., Application Status, Payment Confirmation) */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the notification has been read */,
  "read_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
